behavior_summary: This script implements a set of spell/area-trigger utilities for an 'earth' themed kit of effects: multiple 'fast-area' entry handlers check caster mana, consume mana costs, award small randomized intelligence gains, and then run effect sequences (target prompts, item/NPC spawning, SFX, camera quake pulses and timed visual animations).

The primary entry point U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0080 is a short-range/fast-area cast flow: it closes UI, verifies/consumes 1 mana, prompts for a target (suspend), and either uses a selected item (wrapped by a transient deathSpeakCast flag) or reacts to an NPC target (barks if the NPC is dead).

Other helpers implement larger-cost casts (consume 2..5 mana), timed immunity windows (setImmortal/ clrImmortal), fire-like placement effects (create/pop temporary items and animate frames), camera/quake environmental pulses (U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0), and deferred visual frame sequencing (U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0947 and U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0A78).

Spawned external helpers (FREE::func1C19, FREE::func29D8, METHOD::func15E7, FIRESPEL::* etc.) provide delays, out-of-mana feedback, and SFX. Many flows use spawn + suspend pairs to yield while timed processes or subprocesses run.
notable_control_flow: Most functions guard execution on an enter-fast-area condition (this == 0x01) and begin by calling FREE::closeAllGumps to clear UI state.

Mana-check pattern: Npc::getMana compared against a threshold; if insufficient, METHOD::func15E7 is invoked and short spawn/suspend waits are used for user feedback; on success Npc::setMana is called to subtract the cost and AccumulateIntelligence(FREE::randomInRange(...)) is invoked.

Target-selection pattern: process target() / suspend assigns a local menu_choice (local1/local2) — zero means no-selection and often triggers a non-targeted SFX-only path, otherwise the handle is inspected (Item::getType, Item::isNpc) and effect/pop flows run.

Visual/effect sequencing is implemented via Item::create/Item::pop followed by frame checks/Item::setFrame and repeated spawn -> FREE::func1C19 + suspend cycles to pace animation. Camera shakes are staged in pulses with timed suspends (U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0).
Transient flags and local guards (examples: deathSpeakCast, doneFallEnd, local0) are toggled to coordinate one-shot spawns and to mark an in-progress cast around spawned Item::use calls.
open_questions: Are hydrosFree, deathSpeakCast and doneFallEnd script-global flags or per-instance locals? (script metadata lists no global flags, but section analysis treats some as persistent guards).
Exact player-facing UI text and menu options used in the suspend/target selection flows are not present in the JSON — what menu is shown and how choices map to handles?
Precise semantics of METHOD::func15E7 (exact dialog/SFX) and FREE::func29D8 / FREE::func1C19 (what visual effect they run) are inferred from use but not confirmed.
What are canonical parameter meanings for functions that accept or spawn U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0 (param1) — how does that parameter affect the resulting environmental effect?

main_function.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0080
main_function.purpose: Handle a short-range/fast-area cast: prepare/close UI, ensure the caster has 1 mana (feedback if not), prompt/select a target, then either invoke an item-use (with a transient deathSpeakCast flag) or handle NPC targets (bark if the NPC is dead).
entry_conditions: Called in a context where an NPC caster handle is available (used with Npc::getMana / Npc::setMana)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0080
function_map.role: primary short-range/fast-area cast entry (1-mana cost, target selection, item-use or NPC reaction)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func01AF
function_map.role: variant cast flow: 1-mana check, intelligence award, then set feign-death on caster

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0263
function_map.role: timed immortal window: setImmortal, spawn timers/delays, then clrImmortal

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func02BF
function_map.role: 2-mana cast wrapper that launches a timed-effect helper (spawns U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0263)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0379
function_map.role: larger spell effect: vocal barks, target selection, placement validation, create/pop temporary item(s), animate frames, spawn fire-spell effect (FIRESPEL::*), and optionally create an NPC/effect

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0947
function_map.role: visual-item sequencer: create/pop items at offsets, inspect/set frames, spawn short timers and advance animation states (used to produce debris/visual effects)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0A78
function_map.role: deferred frame-updater: spawn U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0947 once on a specific frame transition and pace frame increments with timers

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0AF8
function_map.role: 3-mana area-trigger that launches map-specific/environmental events (hydros branch) and spawns visual helpers (U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0A78, U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0E57
function_map.role: 3-mana targeted helper: prompt/select target, play FIRESPEL SFX if no target, otherwise create/pop an NPC/object at target location and invoke its use

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func0FC9
function_map.role: 4-mana area-trigger that awards intelligence and sets a withstand-death effect on caster

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func107D
function_map.role: 5-mana cast wrapper that consumes mana, awards intelligence and calls castGrantPeaceSpell() (the spell effect)

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func112D
function_map.role: 5-mana wrapper that consumes mana and spawns U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0 as post-cast environmental effect

function_map.name: U8P_ERTHSPEL::func11F0
function_map.role: environmental/effect routine: staged camera quakes, per-tick checks that may spawn conversation checks or Item::gotHit, and a decay counter to end pulses

internal_calls.purpose: Launch the timed immortal/effect sequence after consuming mana
Spawn the visual-item sequencer once during a specific frame transition
Spawn a deferred visual updater after popping an item in a map-specific event
Spawn environmental effects (camera quake, pulses) as part of a map-specific event
Spawn an environmental/effect process after consuming mana

external_calls.purpose: Clear UI before presenting target UI or running cast flow
Check and decrement caster mana (cost = 1) for the cast
Provide out-of-mana feedback or error routine when mana is insufficient
Decide whether a selected handle is an item to use (invoke Item::use) or an NPC to inspect (isDead/bark)
Play spell sound/visual effects during a fire/spell cast
Prepare targeting/UI state or run pre-targeting steps before suspend/select
Create and animate temporary items to produce visual/debris effects
Run staged camera shake pulses as part of environmental effect
Spawn short/long delay processes used to pace animations and out-of-mana feedback waits

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a set of spell/area-trigger utilities for an 'earth' themed kit of effects: multiple 'fast-area' entry handlers check caster mana, consume mana costs, award small randomized intelligence gains, and then run effect sequences (target prompts, item/NPC spawning, SFX, camera quake pulses and timed visual animations).
